name: Focaccia Rustica (Country Focaccia with Red P
recipeIngredient: 3 red or yellow bell peppers, roasted and sliced
4 ripe tomatoes, seeded and squeezed dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Warm the garlic cloves in olive oil over low heat until the garlic begins to brown. Discard the garlic and let the oil cool.
2. Whisk the yeast into the warm water and let proof for 10 minutes.
3. Add the cooled olive oil, salt, flour, and herbs. Mix well.
4. Knead by hand for 6 to 8 minutes. Place dough in a lightly oiled bowl, cover, and let rise until doubled.
5. Divide the dough into two equal pieces. Set each piece on an oiled baking sheet (10 1/2" X 15 1/2").
6. Cover and let it relax for 15 minutes.
7. Dimple and stretch the dough slightly. Let rise until puffy, about 50 minutes.
8. While it is rising, roast, peel, and slice the peppers into thin strips. Sauté the onions in the olive oil over very low heat for 20 to 25 minutes until they are soft and limp.
9. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
10. Lightly dip your fingers in the remaining olive oil and dimple the tops of the dough.
11. Divide the vegetables evenly and distribute them over the focaccia. Sprinkle with basil leaves and salt.
12. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes until the dough is crispy on the edges. Cool briefly, then remove from sheets and let cool on racks. Serve at room temperature.
